signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]  
The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit provides regulatory clarity, driving XRP's 10% weekly gain to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance, signaling a fundamental shift in market sentiment and potential institutional adoption. [1]

signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence** [2]  
Official RLUSD launch coincides with record XRPL transaction volume and XRP ETF approvals nearing final stages, boosting ecosystem capital inflows as of April 19. [2]

signals.raw:

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell nominee Kevin Warsh faced Senate Banking Committee questioning on April 21, 2026, criticizing prior Fed "policy errors" in 2021-2022 that allowed inflation to soar, calling it a "fatal policy error" harder
